assertions.text: Runs npm run build and reports its result
Searches for hardcoded 'court_001' outside constants.js and reports result
Searches for this.isBookingExpired and reports result
Checks for 60-second booking expiry literals and reports result
Checks functions/index.js for client-supplied amount usage and reports result
Produces a clear PASS/FAIL summary table covering all checks
All checks pass on the current clean codebase (no regressions present)
